subject: OneNote section will not sync — conflict marker
description: Yellow warning on section; edits not appearing on other devices.

ts_steps.title: Open conflict page
ts_steps.action: Follow link to conflict copies; merge content manually into master page.

ts_steps.title: Notebook settings
ts_steps.action: File → Info — check notebook sync status; which account owns notebook.

ts_steps.title: Close and reopen
ts_steps.action: Close notebook, reopen from SharePoint/OneDrive location; update OneNote app.

internal_information: Simultaneous edit on large attachment page. Old OneNote 2016 vs UWP vs for Windows 10+ differences.
